task: the notifications now work and also have sound. i've connected my android phone via kde connect and when i receive an email via thunderbird or run 'notify-send "Reminder"' from our container here I get a notification also on android. but when opencode finishes the plugin is not able to send the notification in a way that kde connect can work with it
